name: pm-skills-select
title: PM Skills Select
tagline: The router, concierge, and orchestrator for the whole marketplace.
description: Selects the best PM plugin, skill, command, or multi-step workflow for a product-management situation. Use first when unsure which PM skill to use.

name: pm-product-discovery-lap
title: Product Discovery
tagline: From ambiguous idea to validated opportunity.
description: Discovery, customer learning, assumptions, experiments, JTBD, interviews, opportunities, personas, journeys, and validation.

name: pm-product-strategy-lap
title: Product Strategy
tagline: Vision, positioning, models, choices, and strategic clarity.
description: Product strategy, vision, value proposition, business model, pricing, competitive landscape, working backwards, and market choices.

name: pm-execution-lap
title: Execution & Delivery
tagline: Turn strategy into buildable, testable, shippable work.
description: PRDs, OKRs, roadmaps, sprints, retros, release notes, stories, epics, test scenarios, pre-mortems, and stakeholder management.

name: pm-market-research-lap
title: Market Research
tagline: Understand users, markets, competitors, segments, and feedback.
description: Personas, segmentation, journey maps, market sizing, competitor analysis, company research, and sentiment analysis.

name: pm-data-analytics-lap
title: Data Analytics
tagline: Use data to decide, diagnose, and learn.
description: SQL generation, cohort analysis, A/B test analysis, metrics diagnostics, retention curves, and dashboards.

name: pm-go-to-market-lap
title: Go-to-Market
tagline: Launch, sell, grow, and win with a clear motion.
description: GTM strategy, beachhead segments, ICP, growth loops, GTM motions, acquisition channels, launch planning, and battlecards.

name: pm-marketing-growth-lap
title: Marketing & Growth
tagline: Position, name, message, and compound growth.
description: Marketing ideas, positioning, value-prop statements, product naming, North Star metrics, and organic growth diagnostics.

name: pm-finance-saas-lap
title: Finance & SaaS Economics
tagline: Make product decisions through revenue, retention, and efficiency.
description: SaaS finance metrics, unit economics, business health, pricing economics, feature investment, and acquisition efficiency.

name: pm-ai-product-lap
title: AI Product Management
tagline: Build AI-shaped products with evidence, context, and proof-of-life testing.
description: AI readiness, context engineering, recommendation canvases, Proof of Life probes, and AI product validation.

name: pm-career-leadership-lap
title: Career & Leadership
tagline: Coach PMs from product sense to Director, VP, and CPO altitude.
description: Product sense interview coaching, director readiness, VP/CPO readiness, executive onboarding, and leadership altitude frameworks.

name: pm-toolkit-lap
title: PM Toolkit
tagline: Practical PM utilities beyond core product work.
description: Resume review, proofreading, NDA drafting, privacy policies, dummy data, and skill authoring support.
